# Security Policy

## Supported Versions
We actively provide security updates for the following versions:

| Version | Supported          |
| ------- | ------------------ |
| main    | ✅ Yes             |
| < 1.0   | ❌ No              |

## Reporting a Vulnerability
If you find a security vulnerability, please **do not** open a public issue. Instead:

1. Send an email to **support@devopsvaultx.com**.
2. Describe the vulnerability and provide steps to reproduce it.
3. We will acknowledge your report within 48 hours and provide a fix as soon as possible.

Thank you for helping keep DevOpsVaultX secure!
